title: EYITT: requesting places and allocations methodology 2025 to 2026
body: "This guidance is for EYITT providers and lead schools. It explains the process for providers requesting EYITT places for the 2025 to 2026 academic year.  The Department for Education has told providers who bid for EYITT places how many places they have been allocated.  Undergraduate courses leading to early years teacher status are not subject to allocations.  "
